name: @stefanobalocco/honosignedrequests
description: An hono middleware to manage signed requests, including a client implementation.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.build:client: tsc -p client/tsconfig.json && terser client/dist/SignedRequester.js -o client/dist/SignedRequester.min.js --toplevel -m -c --mangle-props regex=/^_/
